nasb.text: And Jehoshaphat slept with his fathers and was buried with his fathers in the city of his father David, and Jehoram his son became king in his place.

esv.text: And Jehoshaphat slept with his fathers and was buried with his fathers in the city of David his father, and Jehoram his son reigned in his place.

cnv.text: 約沙法與他的列祖同睡，與他的列祖一同埋葬在他先祖大衛的城裡；他的兒子約蘭接續他作王。

ccb.text: 约沙法与祖先同眠后葬在大卫城他的祖坟里。他儿子约兰继位。
